message:
fix: replace empty TODO handlers with toast notifications in MissionControlDialog (#3730)

The "Deploy Local" and "Dry Run" buttons had empty onClick handlers with
TODO comments, making them silently non-functional. Replace with
informative toast notifications so users get feedback when clicking.

Closes #3726

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
